<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Calculatrice Tarifs — Monteur Nomade</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/aston');
  :root {
    --bg:     #0a0906;
    --surf:   #14110b;
    --surf2:  #1b1710;
    --border: #2a2315;
    --bord2:  #3a3020;
    --g1:     #e0c590;
    --g2:     #e0c590;
    --g3:     #c9a84c;
    --text:   #F0EAD6;
    --muted:  #7a6a45;
    --muted2: #4a3e24;
    --white:  #FFFFFF;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
    min-height: 100vh;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  body::after {
    content:'';
    position:fixed; inset:0;
    background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.028'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events:none; z-index:999;
  }

  .topline {
    height:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--g3) 20%, var(--g2) 50%, var(--g3) 80%, transparent);
  }

  header {
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:16px 48px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    background:rgba(10,9,6,0.96);
    backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50;
  }

  .logo-wrap { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }

  .logo-img { width:38px; height:38px; object-fit:contain; }

  .logo-top {
    font-size:15px; font-weight:900;
    color:var(--white); letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase; line-height:1;
  }

  .logo-bot {
    font-size:12px; font-weight:600; font-style:italic; letter-spacing:.04em;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--g1), var(--g2));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
    margin-top:2px;
  }

  .hdr-right {
    font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--muted);
    letter-spacing:.22em; text-transform:uppercase;
  }

  /* Layout */
  .layout {
    max-width:560px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 20px;
  }

  .form-col {
    padding:32px 0 32px 0;
  }

  .page-title {
    font-size:clamp(22px,6vw,38px); font-weight:900;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:-.02em; line-height:1.08;
    color:var(--white); margin-bottom:10px;
  }

  .page-title span {
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--g1), var(--g2), var(--g3));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
  }

  .page-sub {
    font-size:12px; font-weight:400; color:var(--muted);
    line-height:1.7; max-width:400px; margin-bottom:32px;
  }

  /* Section */
  .section { margin-bottom:28px; animation:fadeUp .4s ease both; }
  .section:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.04s}
  .section:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.08s}
  .section:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.12s}

  .sec-head { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:13px; }
  .sec-num { font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:var(--g1); letter-spacing:.2em; }
  .sec-title { font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--muted); letter-spacing:.22em; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .sec-line { flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }

  /* Cards 2 col */
  .cards-two { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; align-items:stretch; width:100%; }

  .card { position:relative; }
  .card input { position:absolute; opacity:0; width:0; height:0; }

  .card-body {
    padding:14px 16px;
    border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px;
    background:var(--surf); cursor:pointer;
    transition:border-color .2s, background .2s, box-shadow .2s;
    user-select:none;
    flex:1;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }

  .card { display:flex; width:100%; }
  .card > label { width:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
  .card input + .card-body { flex:1; }

  .card-body:hover { border-color:var(--bord2); background:var(--surf2); }

  .card input:checked + .card-body {
    border-color:var(--g1);
    background:linear-gradient(140deg,#181208,#1e1609);
    box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(165,127,57,.09), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(165,127,57,.1);
  }

  .card-name {
    font-size:12px; font-weight:800; color:var(--text);
    letter-spacing:.04em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:5px;
  }

  .card input:checked + .card-body .card-name {
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--g1),var(--g2));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
  }

  .card-desc { font-size:11px; font-weight:400; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.5; }

  /* Style cards 3 col */
  .cards-three { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:8px; align-items:stretch; width:100%; }

  /* Slider durée */
  .dur-slider-wrap {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;
  }

  .dur-top {
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  }

  .dur-hint { font-size:11px; font-weight:500; color:var(--muted); }

  .dur-val {
    font-size:14px; font-weight:800;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--g1),var(--g2));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
    letter-spacing:.02em;
  }

  .dur-track {
    position:relative; height:28px; display:flex; align-items:center;
  }

  input[type=range] {
    -webkit-appearance:none; appearance:none;
    width:100%; height:3px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--g1) var(--pct,20%), var(--bord2) var(--pct,20%));
    border-radius:2px; outline:none; cursor:pointer;
  }

  input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    -webkit-appearance:none;
    width:20px; height:20px; border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--bg); border:2px solid var(--g1);
    cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(165,127,57,.45);
    transition:box-shadow .2s, transform .2s;
  }

  input[type=range]:hover::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    box-shadow:0 0 22px rgba(165,127,57,.65);
    transform:scale(1.12);
  }

  .dur-ticks {
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:0 2px; margin-top:6px;
  }

  .dur-tick { font-size:9px; font-weight:600; color:var(--muted2); letter-spacing:.04em; }

  /* Result col */
  .result-col {
    padding:0 0 80px 0;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
  }

  .res-lbl {
    font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:var(--muted);
    letter-spacing:.25em; text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:22px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  }
  .res-lbl::after { content:''; flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }

  .fmt-pill {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center;
    padding:3px 10px;
    border:1px solid rgba(165,127,57,.22); border-radius:100px;
    background:rgba(165,127,57,.05);
    font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:var(--g1);
    letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }

  /* Price — compact */
  .price-block { margin-bottom:0; }

  .price-label {
    font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--muted);
    letter-spacing:.18em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:6px;
  }

  .price-main {
    display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:5px; margin-bottom:5px;
  }

  .price-sym {
    font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:var(--g1); opacity:.7; line-height:1;
  }

  .price-figure {
    font-size:38px; font-weight:900; line-height:1; letter-spacing:-.03em;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--g1),var(--g2),var(--g3));
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text;
  }

  .price-range {
    font-size:11px; font-weight:500; color:var(--muted);
  }

  .price-range b { color:var(--text); font-weight:700; }

  /* Divider */
  .gdiv { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin:16px 0; }
  .gdiv-line { flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }
  .gdiv-diamond { width:5px; height:5px; background:var(--g1); transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:.35; }

  

  

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}
    to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
  }

  @keyframes goldPop {
    0%{filter:brightness(1.6)}100%{filter:brightness(1)}
  }
  .pop { animation:goldPop .3s ease; }

  @media(max-width:480px){
    header{padding:14px 20px;}
    .layout{padding:0 16px;}
    .cards-three{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="topline"></div>

<header style="justify-content:center; padding:18px 24px;">
  <div class="logo-wrap" style="justify-content:center;">
    <img class="logo-img" style="width:40px;height:40px;object-fit:contain;" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Monteur Nomade">

  </div>
</header>

<div class="layout">
  <div class="form-col">

    <div class="page-title" style="text-align:center;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:12px;">Calcule ton tarif</div>
    <p class="page-sub" style="text-align:center; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;">Configure ton projet et obtiens une estimation calée sur les standards du marché freelance pour monteurs vidéo.</p>

    <!-- 01 Niveau -->
    <div class="section">
      <div class="sec-head">
        <span class="sec-num">01</span>
        <span class="sec-title">Ton niveau</span>
        <div class="sec-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-two">
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="level" value="junior" checked onchange="calc()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Débutant</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Moins de 6 mois d'expérience, tu construis ton premier portfolio</div>
          </div>
        </label>
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="level" value="mid" onchange="calc()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Intermédiaire</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Plus de 6 mois, clients réguliers, style affirmé</div>
          </div>
        </label>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 02 Format -->
    <div class="section">
      <div class="sec-head">
        <span class="sec-num">02</span>
        <span class="sec-title">Format de la vidéo</span>
        <div class="sec-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-two">
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="format" value="court" checked onchange="switchFormat()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Format Court</div>
            <div class="card-desc">TikTok, Reels, Short</div>
          </div>
        </label>
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="format" value="long" onchange="switchFormat()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Format Long</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Facecam, vlog, VSL</div>
          </div>
        </label>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 03 Durée -->
    <div class="section">
      <div class="sec-head">
        <span class="sec-num">03</span>
        <span class="sec-title" id="durTitle">Durée — Format Court</span>
        <div class="sec-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="dur-slider-wrap">
        <div class="dur-top">
          <span class="dur-hint" id="durHint">Durée finale estimée</span>
          <span class="dur-val" id="durVal">45 sec</span>
        </div>
        <div class="dur-track">
          <input type="range" id="durSlider" min="0" max="11" value="2" oninput="updateDur(); calc()">
        </div>
        <div class="dur-ticks" id="durTicks"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 04 Style -->
    <div class="section">
      <div class="sec-head">
        <span class="sec-num">04</span>
        <span class="sec-title">Style de montage</span>
        <div class="sec-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-three">
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="style" value="simple" checked onchange="calc()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Basique</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Dérush, sous-titres, musique (et B-roll si fourni)</div>
          </div>
        </label>
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="style" value="dynamic" onchange="calc()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Dynamique</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Hook dynamique, le reste du montage reste fluide et posé (style basique)</div>
          </div>
        </label>
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="style" value="motion" onchange="calc()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Motion Design</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Animations After Effects (le tarif varie selon le nombre d'animations)</div>
          </div>
        </label>
      </div>
    </div>


    <!-- 05 Pack -->
    <div class="section" style="margin-bottom:0;">
      <div class="sec-head">
        <span class="sec-num">05</span>
        <span class="sec-title">Pack de vidéos</span>
        <div class="sec-line"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-two">
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="pack" value="non" checked onchange="togglePack()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Vidéo unique</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Une seule vidéo, tarif plein</div>
          </div>
        </label>
        <label class="card">
          <input type="radio" name="pack" value="oui" onchange="togglePack()">
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-name">Pack</div>
            <div class="card-desc">Plusieurs vidéos, remise selon volume</div>
          </div>
        </label>
      </div>
      <div id="packDetails" style="display:none; margin-top:12px;">
        <div id="packRemises" style="margin-bottom:12px;"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0;margin-top:4px;">
          <button onclick="stepQty(-1)"
            style="width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-right:none;
                   border-radius:8px 0 0 8px;background:var(--surf);color:var(--g2);
                   font-size:20px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;"
            onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surf2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='var(--surf)'">−</button>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
                      width:90px;height:44px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
                      background:var(--surf2);">
            <span id="packQtyVal" style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--g2);line-height:1;">1</span>
            <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-top:1px;">VIDÉOS</span>
          </div>
          <button onclick="stepQty(1)"
            style="width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:none;
                   border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;background:var(--surf);color:var(--g2);
                   font-size:20px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;"
            onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surf2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='var(--surf)'">+</button>
        </div>
        <input type="hidden" id="packQty" value="1">
        </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /form-col -->

  <!-- RESULT -->
  <div class="result-col" style="padding-top:28px; margin-top:0; border-top:1px solid var(--border);">

    <div class="price-block" style="text-align:center;">
      <div id="unitPriceBlock"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px;">Prix recommandé</div>
      <div class="price-main" style="justify-content:center;">
        <span class="price-sym">€</span>
        <span class="price-figure" id="priceNum">—</span>
      </div>
      <div class="price-range" style="text-align:center;margin-top:4px;">Fourchette : <b id="pLow">—</b> – <b id="pHigh">—</b> €</div>
      </div>
      <div id="packResult" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);"><div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:8px;">Prix recommandé</div>
        
        <div class="price-main" style="justify-content:center;">
          <span class="price-sym" style="font-size:13px;">€</span>
          <span id="packTotal" style="font-size:30px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.02em;
                background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--g1),var(--g2),var(--g3));
                -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;">—</span>
        </div>
        <div id="packDiscount" style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--g1);letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:2px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
const COURT_PALIERS = [
  { label:'0–15s',     base:20 },
  { label:'15–30s',    base:25 },
  { label:'30–45s',    base:30 },
  { label:'45–60s',    base:35 },
  { label:'1m–1m15',   base:38 },
  { label:'1m15–1m30', base:42 },
  { label:'1m30–1m45', base:45 },
  { label:'1m45–2m',   base:48 },
  { label:'2m–2m15',   base:50 },
  { label:'2m15–2m30', base:52 },
  { label:'2m30–2m45', base:55 },
  { label:'2m45–3m',   base:58 },
];

const LONG_CFG   = { base:60, ref:5, perMin:8 };
const STYLEM     = { simple:1.0, dynamic:1.4, motion:2.6 };
const LEVELM     = { junior:1.0, mid:1.5 };
const PACK_COURT = [{ qty:10, pct:10 }, { qty:20, pct:15 }, { qty:30, pct:20 }];
const PACK_LONG  = [{ qty:4,  pct:10 }, { qty:6,  pct:15 }, { qty:8,  pct:20 }];

let currentFormat = 'court';

// ── Pack remises display ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function renderPackRemises() {
  var paliers   = currentFormat === 'court' ? PACK_COURT : PACK_LONG;
  var container = document.getElementById('packRemises');
  container.innerHTML = paliers.map(function(p) {
    return '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;'
      + 'padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;'
      + 'background:var(--surf);margin-bottom:7px;">'
      + '<span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);">' + p.qty + '+ vidéos</span>'
      + '<span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--g1);">−' + p.pct + ' %</span>'
      + '</div>';
  }).join('');
}

function getDiscount(qty) {
  var paliers = currentFormat === 'court' ? PACK_COURT : PACK_LONG;
  var pct = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < paliers.length; i++) {
    if (qty >= paliers[i].qty) pct = paliers[i].pct;
  }
  return pct;
}

// ── Pack toggle ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function togglePack() {
  var isPack = document.querySelector('input[name="pack"]:checked').value === 'oui';
  document.getElementById('packDetails').style.display    = isPack ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('packResult').style.display     = 'none';
  document.getElementById('unitPriceBlock').style.display = 'block';
  calc();
}

// ── Qty input ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function clampQty() {
  var max   = currentFormat === 'court' ? 30 : 8;
  var input = document.getElementById('packQty');
  var v     = parseInt(input.value) || 1;
  v = Math.max(1, Math.min(max, v));
  input.value = v;
  document.getElementById('packQtyVal').textContent = v;
}

function stepQty(dir) {
  var max   = currentFormat === 'court' ? 30 : 8;
  var input = document.getElementById('packQty');
  var v     = parseInt(input.value) || 1;
  v = Math.max(1, Math.min(max, v + dir));
  input.value = v;
  document.getElementById('packQtyVal').textContent = v;
  calc();
}

// ── Slider ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function setupSlider(fmt) {
  var slider = document.getElementById('durSlider');
  var ticks  = document.getElementById('durTicks');
  if (fmt === 'court') {
    slider.min = 0; slider.max = 11; slider.value = 2;
    document.getElementById('durTitle').textContent = 'Durée — Format Court';
    document.getElementById('durHint').textContent  = 'Durée finale estimée';
    ticks.innerHTML = ['0s','45s','1m30','2m15','3m'].map(function(t){ return '<span class="dur-tick">'+t+'</span>'; }).join('');
    document.getElementById('packQty').max = 30;
  } else {
    slider.min = 1; slider.max = 60; slider.value = 10;
    document.getElementById('durTitle').textContent = 'Durée — Format Long';
    document.getElementById('durHint').textContent  = 'Durée finale estimée';
    ticks.innerHTML = ['1 min','15 min','30 min','45 min','60 min'].map(function(t){ return '<span class="dur-tick">'+t+'</span>'; }).join('');
    document.getElementById('packQty').max = 8;
    var q = document.getElementById('packQty');
    if (parseInt(q.value) > 8) { q.value = 8; }
  }
  renderPackRemises();
  updateDur();
}

function updateDur() {
  var slider = document.getElementById('durSlider');
  var v   = parseInt(slider.value);
  var mn  = parseInt(slider.min);
  var mx  = parseInt(slider.max);
  var pct = ((v - mn) / (mx - mn)) * 100;
  slider.style.setProperty('--pct', pct + '%');
  if (currentFormat === 'court') {
    document.getElementById('durVal').textContent = COURT_PALIERS[v].label;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('durVal').textContent = v >= 60 ? '60 min+' : v + ' min';
  }
}

// ── Format switch ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function switchFormat() {
  currentFormat = document.querySelector('input[name="format"]:checked').value;
  var nonRadio = document.querySelector('input[name="pack"][value="non"]');
  if (nonRadio) nonRadio.checked = true;
  document.getElementById('packDetails').style.display    = 'none';
  document.getElementById('packResult').style.display     = 'none';
  document.getElementById('unitPriceBlock').style.display = 'block';
  setupSlider(currentFormat);
  calc();
}

// ── Calc ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function r5(n) { return Math.round(n / 5) * 5; }

function calc() {
  var level  = document.querySelector('input[name="level"]:checked').value;
  var style  = document.querySelector('input[name="style"]:checked').value;
  var isPack = document.querySelector('input[name="pack"]:checked').value === 'oui';
  var v      = parseInt(document.getElementById('durSlider').value);

  var base = 0, durExtra = 0;
  if (currentFormat === 'court') {
    base = COURT_PALIERS[v].base;
  } else {
    durExtra = Math.max(0, v - LONG_CFG.ref) * LONG_CFG.perMin;
    base     = LONG_CFG.base;
  }

  var unitRaw = (base + durExtra) * STYLEM[style] * LEVELM[level];
  var rounded = r5(unitRaw);

  var el = document.getElementById('priceNum');
  el.textContent = rounded;
  el.classList.remove('pop');
  void el.offsetWidth;
  el.classList.add('pop');

  document.getElementById('pLow').textContent  = r5(unitRaw * 0.85);
  document.getElementById('pHigh').textContent = r5(unitRaw * 1.25);

  if (isPack) {
    var qty = parseInt(document.getElementById('packQty').value) || 1;
    document.getElementById('packQtyVal').textContent = qty;
    var pct   = getDiscount(qty);
    var total = r5(unitRaw * qty * (1 - pct / 100));
    document.getElementById('packResult').style.display     = 'block';
    document.getElementById('unitPriceBlock').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('packTotal').textContent        = total;
    document.getElementById('packDiscount').textContent     = pct > 0 ? 'REMISE DE ' + pct + ' % APPLIQUÉE' : 'AUCUNE REMISE POUR CETTE QUANTITÉ';
  } else {
    document.getElementById('packResult').style.display     = 'none';
    document.getElementById('unitPriceBlock').style.display = 'block';
  }
}

// ── Init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
setupSlider('court');
calc();
</script>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer style="margin-top:40px; padding:36px 24px 48px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); text-align:center;">

    <!-- CTA -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:32px;">
      <p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;max-width:380px;margin:0 auto 16px;">
        ↓ Si tu veux stabiliser ton activité ↓
      </p>
      <a href="https://camille-bruchon.tinypages.co/forms/yGf1MaLbT0" target="_blank"
        style="display:inline-block;padding:14px 32px;
               background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--g1),var(--g3));
               color:#0a0906;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;
               letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
               border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none;
               transition:opacity .2s;"
        onmouseover="this.style.opacity='.85'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
        Rejoindre Monteur Nomade
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Liens sociaux -->
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:24px;margin-bottom:20px;">
      <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@camillebruchon_" target="_blank"
        style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
               color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
               transition:color .2s;"
        onmouseover="this.style.color='var(--g1)'" onmouseout="this.style.color='var(--muted)'">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
          <path d="M23.5 6.2a3 3 0 0 0-2.1-2.1C19.5 3.5 12 3.5 12 3.5s-7.5 0-9.4.6A3 3 0 0 0 .5 6.2C0 8.1 0 12 0 12s0 3.9.6 5.8a3 3 0 0 0 2.1 2.1c1.9.6 9.4.6 9.4.6s7.5 0 9.4-.6a3 3 0 0 0 2.1-2.1C24 15.9 24 12 24 12s0-3.9-.5-5.8zM9.7 15.5V8.5l6.3 3.5-6.3 3.5z"/>
        </svg>
        YouTube
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/camillebruchon/" target="_blank"
        style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
               color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
               transition:color .2s;"
        onmouseover="this.style.color='var(--g1)'" onmouseout="this.style.color='var(--muted)'">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
          <path d="M12 2.2c3.2 0 3.6 0 4.9.1 3.3.2 4.8 1.7 5 5 .1 1.3.1 1.6.1 4.8s0 3.6-.1 4.9c-.2 3.2-1.7 4.8-5 5-1.3.1-1.6.1-4.9.1s-3.6 0-4.9-.1c-3.3-.2-4.8-1.7-5-5C2 16.6 2 16.3 2 12s0-3.6.1-4.9c.2-3.3 1.7-4.8 5-5C8.4 2.2 8.8 2.2 12 2.2zm0-2.2C8.7 0 8.3 0 7.1.1 2.7.3.3 2.7.1 7.1 0 8.3 0 8.7 0 12s0 3.7.1 4.9C.3 21.3 2.7 23.7 7.1 23.9 8.3 24 8.7 24 12 24s3.7 0 4.9-.1c4.4-.2 6.8-2.6 7-7C24 15.7 24 15.3 24 12s0-3.7-.1-4.9C23.7 2.7 21.3.3 16.9.1 15.7 0 15.3 0 12 0zm0 5.8a6.2 6.2 0 1 0 0 12.4A6.2 6.2 0 0 0 12 5.8zm0 10.2a4 4 0 1 1 0-8 4 4 0 0 1 0 8zm6.4-11.8a1.4 1.4 0 1 0 0 2.8 1.4 1.4 0 0 0 0-2.8z"/>
        </svg>
        Instagram
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Copyright -->
    <p style="font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;">
      © 2026 Monteur Nomade — Camille Bruchon
    </p>

  </footer>
</body>
</html>
